success_sub: Login credentials (email and temporary password) have been sent to your email address. Check your inbox and sign in.
error_INVALID_TOKEN: The link is invalid. You may have already used it or copied it incompletely.
error_ALREADY_CONFIRMED: This link has already been used. Your restaurant is already created. Go to login.
error_TOKEN_EXPIRED: The link has expired (24 hours). Please register again.
error_default: An error occurred during confirmation. Please try again or contact support.
